# RootsValidation.RootsListChangedNotificationMethod field

The `notifications/roots/list_changed` method name. ⚠️ UNSUPPORTED in this revision: no `listChanged` sub-flag is defined for `roots`, so a client MUST NOT rely on it (R-21.1.2-c; AC-32.5). Named only so a receiver can recognize and ignore it.
